capabilities.name: Isolated Execution Sandboxes
capabilities.description: Ability to create and deploy code into isolated local environments for testing and prototyping.

capabilities.name: Slack Human-in-the-Loop Approval
capabilities.description: Integration with Slack to require user approval for high-risk actions like file deletions.

capabilities.name: Immutable Interaction Logs
capabilities.description: Automatic logging of every agent session and output to local JSON files for auditing.

capabilities.name: Multi-Model Provider Support
capabilities.description: Support for switching between local (Ollama) and cloud (Gemini) models for different tasks.

capabilities.name: Automated Quality Gates
capabilities.description: Built-in quality assurance agent (Quality Quigon) to validate code and prototypes.

capabilities.name: LLM-as-Judge Evaluation
capabilities.description: Capability to use secondary models to objectively score agent performance and safety.

capabilities.name: Agent Trajectory Analysis
capabilities.description: Ability to evaluate the step-by-step reasoning and tool-use efficiency of agents.

capabilities.name: Safety & Adversarial Red-Teaming
capabilities.description: Automated probing for safety boundary violations and prompt injections.
